title: Wii as game developers experience it

description.en: The Wii as the third-party game developer experiences it: SDK + dev kit + per-disc licensing fee + access to a 100M+ user base that PS3/Xbox 360 didn't reach. The money side — what funded Nintendo's hardware subsidy of the gamer side.
description.zh: 第三方游戏开发者眼中的 Wii:SDK + 开发套件 + 按光盘付授权费 + 触达 PS3 / Xbox 360 触达不到的 1 亿+ 用户群。这是收钱方 —— 它支付了任天堂在玩家一边的硬件补贴。
